

## Diagnostic classification

This script prepares two external cognitive classification datasets ‚Äî **Langa-Weir** and **Hudomiet** ‚Äî for integration into the analytic pipeline. Both are trimmed to the relevant wave/variables, identifiers are standardized to `HHID`/`PN`, and a derived three-category Hudomiet classification variable is constructed. 

A third classifier (Hurd dementia probabilities) was evaluated but excluded because it is only available through wave 2007, making it incompatible with the 2016 analytic wave.

*Input Data*

| Object | Source File | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `langa_weir` | `A0_005_langa_weir.rds` | Langa-Weir cognitive status classification |
| `hudomiet` | `A0_005_hudomiet.rds` | Hudomiet probabilistic cognitive classification (waves 5‚Äì13) |
| ~~`hurd`~~ | ~~`A0_005_hurd.rds`~~ | ~~Hurd dementia probabilities~~ (excluded; only available through 2007) |


### 1. Langa-Weir (`langa_weir`)

Only the cognitive status variable for 2016 is retained:

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `HHID` | Household identifier |
| `PN` | Person number |
| `cogfunction2016` | Langa-Weir cognitive function classification, 2016 wave |


### 2. Hudomiet (`hudomiet`)

#### Wave Filtering

The Hudomiet dataset spans waves 5 (year 2000) through 13 (year 2016). Only **wave 13** (2016) is retained.

#### Variable Selection

Five variables are kept from the filtered dataset:

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `PrDem` | Posterior probability of dementia |
| `PrCIND` | Posterior probability of cognitive impairment, no dementia (CIND) |
| `PrNorm` | Posterior probability of normal cognition |
| `Cog` | Posterior mean of the latent cognitive factor |
| `CogSd` | Posterior standard deviation of the latent cognitive factor |

#### Identifier Parsing

The Hudomiet file uses a single concatenated identifier `hhidpn` rather than separate `HHID` and `PN` columns. This is parsed into components using the following steps:

1. Zero-pad `hhidpn` to 9 digits using `sprintf("%009.0f", ...)`
2. Reverse the string
3. Extract the first 3 characters ‚Üí reversed `PN` ‚Üí reverse back to get `PN`
4. Extract characters 4‚Äì9 ‚Üí reversed `HHID` ‚Üí reverse back to get `HHID`
5. Drop all intermediate parsing columns

#### Hudomiet Classification (`Hudomiet_classification`)

A three-category classification is derived by assigning each respondent to the cognitive status with the **highest posterior probability**:

| Value | Label | Rule |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Normal | `PrNorm ‚â• PrCIND` AND `PrNorm ‚â• PrDem` |
| 2 | CIND | `PrCIND ‚â• PrDem` AND `PrCIND > PrNorm` |
| 3 | Dementia | `PrDem > PrCIND` AND `PrDem > PrNorm` |
| `NA` | ‚Äî | No condition met (ties not resolved) |

The variable is labelled: *"Hudomiet classification by highest class proportion"*.
